texto: There are women who inspire you with the desire to conquer them and to take your pleasure of them
autor: but this one fills you only with the desire to die slowly beneath her gaze.
explicacao: Citação de but this one fills you only with the desire to die slowly beneath her gaze. sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “There are women who inspire you with the desire to conquer them and to take your pleasure of them” articula motivacao, charles-baudelaire, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
